name: ai-persona-os
tagline: ClawHub (94★): The complete operating system for OpenClaw 5.x agents. Built-in memory tool integration (memory_search, memory_get, DREAMS.m
verdict: Contains contradictory documentation: one line claims 11 personalities under v1.5.0 while other passages describe a different, incompatible preset scheme, so an agent following it can load the wrong persona set. The 1520-line file buries this contradiction in duplicated text, with no scope boundaries at all.

highlights.summary: Contradicts line 1453 ('└── prebuilt-souls/         → Presets 5-14: 11 distinct personalities (v1.5.0)'), stale documentation from an earlier preset scheme that conflicts with the
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language found anywhere in description or body, despite this being a broad, multi-feature 'operating system' skill where misfir
